is_docked.description: Tests if one or more lawn mowers are docked.
is_docked.name: Lawn mower is docked

is_encountering_an_error.description: Tests if one or more lawn mowers are encountering an error.
is_encountering_an_error.name: Lawn mower is encountering an error

is_mowing.description: Tests if one or more lawn mowers are mowing.
is_mowing.name: Lawn mower is mowing

is_paused.description: Tests if one or more lawn mowers are paused.
is_paused.name: Lawn mower is paused

is_returning.description: Tests if one or more lawn mowers are returning to the dock.
is_returning.name: Lawn mower is returning

dock.description: Returns a lawn mower to its dock.
dock.name: Return lawn mower to dock

pause.description: Pauses a lawn mower's current task.
pause.name: Pause lawn mower

start_mowing.description: Starts a lawn mower's mowing task.
start_mowing.name: Start lawn mower

docked.description: Triggers after one or more lawn mowers have returned to dock.
docked.name: Lawn mower returned to dock

errored.description: Triggers after one or more lawn mowers encounter an error.
errored.name: Lawn mower encountered an error

paused_mowing.description: Triggers after one or more lawn mowers pause mowing.
paused_mowing.name: Lawn mower paused mowing

started_mowing.description: Triggers after one or more lawn mowers start mowing.
started_mowing.name: Lawn mower started mowing

started_returning.description: Triggers after one or more lawn mowers start returning to dock.
started_returning.name: Lawn mower started returning to dock
